hub.abaquiz_desc: Test your ABA knowledge — earn a competency badge at 80%+
hub.biascheck_desc: Gently surfaces patterns in your data for reflection on potential implicit bias — growth, not guilt
hub.caseload_desc: Bird\'s-eye overview of all students — status indicators, trends, safety alerts, and AI caseload summary
hub.commlog_desc: Two-way family contact tracker with follow-ups — ensure no family falls through the cracks
hub.consent_desc: Customizable consent form for parent data exchange — edit, print, share as JSON
hub.cumrecord_desc: Classic Skinner-style cumulative frequency graph — the heritage of ABA data display
hub.deescalate_desc: Breathing exercises, visual timers, sensory breaks, and grounding — real-time calming support
hub.dtt_desc: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.familyvoice_desc: Structured form for families to share observations, cultural insights, and celebrations — with AI translation
hub.ioacalc_desc: Inter-Observer Agreement with 6 methods — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.nlabc_desc: Type or paste observation notes in everyday English — AI structures them into ABC entries automatically
hub.obscoach_desc: Real-time coaching on your data collection quality — identifies gaps, suggests improvements, and rates your data
hub.predict_desc: AI-powered pattern analysis predicting when, where, and what triggers behaviors — with prevention strategies
hub.prefassess_desc: Systematic reinforcer identification — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, and Free Operant protocols
hub.quick_launch_hint: Core clinical tools — one tap access
hub.reinforcement_desc: Structured motivation survey — identify what drives each student across 6 categories
hub.relmap_desc: Visual diagram of student connections — trusted adults, peers, family, mentors — with gap analysis
hub.scatterplot_desc: Time-of-day × behavior grid to identify temporal patterns — auto-populates from ABC data
hub.selfcheck_desc: Student-facing mood check-in and reflection journal — capturing their voice
hub.sessionnotes_desc: Timestamped observation notes with voice dictation — capture context as it happens
hub.snapshot_desc: Export & import JSON snapshots for parent–teacher data exchange
hub.socialvalidity_desc: TARF and IRP-15 scales for measuring treatment acceptability — required for publication
hub.treatintegrity_desc: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed — component-level fidelity tracking
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no: 🎉 DRO interval complete — REINFORCE! No target behavior occurred!
toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl: Graph data ready — auto-fill available in Effect Size!
toast.mastered_n_n_consecutive_sessions_: 🎉 MASTERED! N — N consecutive sessions at criterion!
toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_: Pop-ups blocked — downloaded as HTML file instead.
toast.report_generated_use_printsave_as_: Report generated — use Print/Save as PDF in the new tab!
toast.simulation_started_you_are_now_the: Simulation started — you are now the counselor 🎭
toast.you_have_unsaved_changes_consider_: 💡 You have unsaved changes — consider saving your workspace.
ui.gently_surfaces_patterns_for_reflecti: Gently surfaces patterns for reflection — growth, not guilt
ui.prebuilt_scenarios_covering_the_4_fun: Pre-built scenarios covering the 4 functions of behavior. Work offline — no AI needed.
ui.test_your_behavioral_analysis_knowled: Test your behavioral analysis knowledge — 80% to earn your badge
toast_invalid_file: Invalid workspace file — must be BehaviorLens JSON
